functionality: This view aggregates data from the date dimension materialized view (GALAXY.DATE_DIM_MV) to provide weekly summary information. It calculates various date components like year week number, relative week, min/max year month numbers, min/max relative months, min/max year keys, min/max date keys, min/max actual dates, and counts of total and working days for each week, filtered for dates from 2013-01-01 up to two years in the future.
